creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Mon Oct 14 16:10:52 2013
New Revision: 330334
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330334

Log:
  Do not try to remove directories belonging to BSD.local.dist
  While here, convert to STAGEDIR
  
  PR:		ports/182488
  Reported by:	portbuild & poudriere -t
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (15 days)

Modified:
  head/devel/bzr/Makefile
  head/devel/bzr/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/bzr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/bzr/Makefile	Mon Oct 14 15:35:29 2013	(r330333)
+++ head/devel/bzr/Makefile	Mon Oct 14 16:10:52 2013	(r330334)
@@ -23,9 +23,6 @@ USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	bzr
 USES=		gettext
 
-MAN1=		bzr.1
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSFTP}
@@ -37,7 +34,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/share/certs/c
 .endif
 
 post-install:
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/bzr.1 ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/bzr.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
 
 test:	build
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ./bzr selftest

Modified: head/devel/bzr/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/bzr/pkg-plist	Mon Oct 14 16:10:52 2013	(r330334)
